data.description:
Для українців за кордоном голос — це не лише інструмент комунікації, а й спосіб збереження ідентичності та відчуття єдності.
Ми будемо вчитися звучати впевнено і чисто. 
У дружній і теплій атмосфері кожен зможе опанувати основи техніки мовлення та навички публічного виступу.

1. Техніка мовлення. 

Основні й найефективніші вправи з техніки мовлення, щоб звучати чітко та впевнено. 
Робота з диханням, артикуляцією, дикцією, голосом та інтонацією. 
Лекція+ практика

2.  Скарбничка вишуканих українських слів , що збагатить ваше мовлення.
Український мовний етикет — як говорити красиво та правильно. 

Лекція + практика 

3. Публічний виступ. 

Основи публічного виступу : як тримати увагу й говорити так, щоб тебе хотіли слухати.
Невербальна комунікація: мова тіла, зоровий контакт . 
Методи подолання страху виступу . 

Лекція+ практика

4. Самопрезентанція. 

Мистецтво представити себе так, щоб ваша історія зазвучала.
Як структурувати промову й утримувати увагу аудиторії.
Індивідуальна підготовка самопрезентації кожного учасника.
data.name: Майстер-клас з техніки мовлення і навичок публічного виступу

data.description:
Our weekly life drawing session, every Wednesday, from 6 to 8pm.

Open to all levels, these events offer the space to practice drawing from life models in multiple short and long poses, perfect to explore gestures, proportions and facial expressions.

On top of that, our sessions are structured to immerse you in a suggestive atmosphere, through selected music and a curated environment, to make every workshop a captivating experience.

Our 2 hours sessions cost 15€ and include:
- two models, performing various poses
- a friendly environment shared with other fellow amateur and professional artists
- wine, snacks, tea and coffee
- a really cool Spotify playlist

Bring your own materials :)
data.name: Lisbon Life Drawing
data.place: Prisma Estúdio Lisboa, Rua da Palma, Lisbon, Portugal

data.description:
Deep (French) Fado as an inner landscape

For one night, time slows down.
In an exclusive, hidden place in the heart of Lisbon - usually closed - a space opens outside of noise, outside of speed.

French by heart, Portuguese by soul; Fiona French Fadista invites you into a different Fado.
A Fado that unlocks new sensations, where Portuguese saudade meets French audacity, where tradition is not broken, but gently pushed beyond its borders.

Accompanied by two wonderful Fado guitarists, Carlos Fonseca and Miguel Rodrigues Baptista, the guitars become a living pulse - weaving heritage with modern textures, silence with vibration, grounding with elevation.

This is not just a concert.
It’s a ritual.

A lounge atmosphere.
A contemporary spiritual journey.
Emotions flowing from deep shadow to light release.

A moment suspended in time and space.
A modern Fado for what we feel today.

Join Fado as an inner landscape.

Online Booking Required: https://www.eventbrite.com/e/bilhetes-deep-french-fado-fiona-french-fadista-1980725475216?aff=oddtdtcreator

🔗 fionafrenchfadista.com
data.name: Deep (French) Fado - by Fiona French Fadista

data.description:
Фотодень для пар перед 14 февраля

Романтическая фотопрогулка по Байше и центру Лиссабона 📸
Красивые места, живые эмоции и атмосферные кадры для вас двоих.

Вы получите минимум 5 профессиональных фотографий с прогулки.
Плюс — возможность познакомиться с другими парами, погулять вместе, пофоткать друг друга и просто хорошо провести время ✨

Couples Photo Day before Valentine’s Day

A romantic photo walk through Baixa and Lisbon city center 📸
Beautiful spots, real emotions, and atmospheric moments for you as a couple.

You’ll receive at least 5 professional photos from the photo walk.
Plus — a chance to meet other couples, walk together, take photos of each other and enjoy a warm, shared experience ✨
data.name: Couples photo day Baixa

data.description:
EVENING CLAY SCULPTING WORKSHOP 


This is one of Lisbon’s most unique night experiences...


Transform your night in Lisbon into a truly unforgettable experience with a live clay sculpting workshop led by professional sculptor Ella Taub. This is not a drawing class. It is a fully hands-on, immersive evening where you sculpt a live nude model in clay and experience the human form in three dimensions. From the moment you arrive, you will step into an intimate, creative space designed for focus, exploration, and connection.

THE EVENING
Combines the meditative flow of clay sculpting with the social energy of a night out. Portuguese wine is served as you work, creating a relaxed and inspiring atmosphere. All materials are provided, and you will leave with your own finished sculpture to take home. No prior experience is needed, just curiosity and the willingness to dive into the process.



THIS WORKSHOP
Is small and personal, giving you direct guidance from Ella while leaving space for your own creative exploration. It is body-positive, respectful, and artistic, offering a sensual yet comfortable environment that makes the night feel special.

WHAT’S INCLUDED

· All materials provided: clay, professional sculpting tools, work surface
· Portuguese wine served during the session
· Live nude model posing throughout the workshop
· Personal guidance and hands-on instruction
· Your finished clay sculpture to take home
· No experience required



AT THE END
Of the evening, you will take home your very own clay sculpture, a tangible reminder of the night and your creative journey. Holding your finished piece in your hands connects you to the experience long after the workshop ends, letting you relive the focus, the flow, and the joy of sculpting a live model. It is a personal keepsake, a conversation starter, and a unique souvenir from a night out in Lisbon unlike any other.


Led by @ella__taub

READ REVIEWS

google: 
https://g.page/r/CW0fuDhsTG7qEBM/review


CREATIVE DATE NIGHT / SOLO ADVENTURE

Whether you are looking for a creative date night, a solo adventure, or an evening with friends, this workshop turns a regular night out into an extraordinary experience of art, wine, and personal expression. Come ready to engage, relax, and immerse yourself in the process. Comfortable clothing and a container to take your sculpture home are all you need. Spots are limited, so reserve your place now for this exclusive Lisbon night out.


THE EXPERIENCE

· Short introduction to clay sculpting and form
· Observation of the human body in 3D
· Guided sculpting with space for personal exploration
· Calm, focused, and intimate studio atmosphere
· Meditative creative flow combined with social connection



ATMOSPHERE

· Respectful, body-positive, and inclusive space
· Small group for depth, focus, and quality guidance
· Artistic, relaxed, and sensual without being performative
· Ideal for a refined Lisbon night out



PERFECT FOR

· Couples seeking a creative and romantic evening in Lisbon
· Solo travelers looking for a meaningful art experience
· Friends wanting a unique night activity
· Tourists and locals searching for art & wine nights, clay workshops, or adult art classes in Lisbon
· Creative gift seekers and experience-based presents



WHAT TO BRING

· Comfortable clothing suitable for clay work
· Curiosity and openness to working with the human form
· A box or solid base to transport your sculpture



IMPORTANT NOTES

· Adult workshop with a live nude model
· Focus on 3D clay sculpting only
· Doors close 15 minutes after start time
· Limited spots — advance booking required



WHY THIS WORKSHOP

· Sculpt a live nude model in clay in an evening setting
· Combine art, wine, and presence in one experience
· Guided by an established professional sculptor
· Take home a physical artwork made by you
· A sharp, intimate, and unforgettable Lisbon art night


Write us for more info:
    Elatau123@gmail.com
data.name: Lisbon Life Sculpture evening Workshop

owner.about:
I am a sculptor and art educator with over ten years of experience teaching clay sculpting and life model–based studies. 

My practice is rooted in classical sculpture, anatomy, and material exploration of the human form. I offer professional, hands-on workshops for adult students, creating focused and respectful spaces for learning, observation, and creative growth.
owner.name: Ella Taub

data.description:
Майже з моменту відкриття, багато хто, дивлячись на наш неймовірний стіл на 12 людей питав нас: «О, а чи будемо ми грати в «Мафію»?» 

Але як і для кожного заходу в нашому просторі, нам важливий Майстер, який зможе провести цю гру, як виставу, і така людина зʼявилась🥰

Раді запросити шанувальників цієї гри і тих, хто давно хотів спробувати до нас, щоб дізнатись «хто ж серед нас Мафія?»😃

Almost from the moment we opened, many people, looking at our incredible table for 12, have been asking us:
“Oh, are we going to play Mafia here?”

But as with every event in our space, it’s important for us to have a Game Master who can run this game as a real performance and that person has finally appeared 🥰

We’re happy to invite both fans of the game and those who have long wanted to try it to join us and find out:
“Who among us is the Mafia?” 😃
data.name: MAFIA GAME by Serghii Trempolets

Join me for a walk in Alfama and get new portraits and photos of you in the oldest neighborhood of Lisbon.
I'm a local photographer, born and raised in Lisbon.
data.name: Photoshoot Day

data.description:
A caminhada "Uma experiência fora deste planeta" foca-se na observação de fenómenos astronómicos raros, tais como eclipses e chuvas de estrelas, contando com um guia astrónomo qualificado que irá proporcionar diversos conhecimentos, tais como a formação destes fenómenos e  aprender a identificar constelações, por exemplo.

Além disto, esta caminhada interpretativa visa fazer sentir apreço pelo decurso natural da vida, da beleza dos fenómenos naturais e, assim, impactar e modificar as atitudes do quotidiano, de forma a reduzir a pegada ecológica para preservar o mundo em que vivemos.
data.name: Uma experiência fora deste planeta

Date: 13/02
Start: 19:00
Location: LKS Lisbon
R. da Atalaia 133, 1200-211 Lisboa

Official pre-party of Slav Rave dedicated to Valentine’s Night 

Program:
Welcome shots for all guests
Traditional shaverma in Armenian lavash
Disco DJ set by Fabio KSTRO
Gifts for couples
Social game for meeting new people
Friendly crowd and special surprises

Dress code: Slav style (mandatory)

For all details and updates, follow us on Instagram: @monkeyunit12

data.description:
Slav Lovers Rave - Special Edition 2.0
A night for the lovers.
Friday, 13 of February, 11pm-05am
After the last one went total sold out — packed, sweaty, perfect - we're doing it again.
Everyone who made it in fit just right.
Everyone who didn't... now you have a chance.

Dark Disco • Indie Dance • Groovy House • Techno Artemios Trigo, MT-Field, Dmitroz, Vasco, Vlad LX, God Inside

Dress Code: Slav Style

Limited tickets.
Special price for couples at Shotgun - come together, rave together.

Online and before event - cheaper.
Venue: Temple Club, Pátio do Pinzaleiro 26, 1200-869 Lisbon

Additionally, our guests are invited to a free themed SHAVERMA disco pre-party at Lisbon Kebab Station, located near the club in the Bairro Alto area.
Guests can expect welcome shots, giveaways, disco music, and other activities.

For all details and updates, please visit our Instagram: @monkeyunit12
data.name: Slav lovers Rave at Temple

data.description:
What if you could find a moment to stop, relax, breathe, and immerse yourself deeply in the works of art that surround you? 
MAAT challenges you to a unique experience of contemplation and leisurely mediation between art and meditation 🧘🏼‍♀️👩‍🎨
We are in for a meditation called Change, at the exhibition Turn around. A look at the EDP Foundation Art Collection (Part I)🎨

Tickets 🎟️: https://www.maat.pt/en/event/meditate-art
data.name: Meditate with Art
